spec_version.description: CDR spec version; a reader rejects a value it does not implement (§8).

algo.description: Chunk-algorithm tag; must equal the canonical CDR_ALGO for a v0 reader.

file_hash.description: BLAKE3-256 of the whole file (32 bytes; hex/bstr on the wire).

hash.description: BLAKE3-256 of the chunk plaintext (32 bytes).

offset.description: Byte offset of the chunk in the reconstructed file.

codec.description: OPTIONAL (Phase 49h); default none. Orthogonal to identity.

chunks.description: Ordered; chunks tile the file contiguously from offset 0 and their bytes concatenate to reconstruct it.
